# Shokunin AI Ecosystem

> 62 skills for AI coding agents. Infrastructure, backend, frontend, mobile, content, quality, productivity, documents, and AI agents. Each skill provides structured workflows, checklists, and domain-specific knowledge for production-grade software engineering.

## Core Resources

- [Skills Directory](https://eliasoulkadi.github.io/shokunin/skills.html): Complete listing of all 62 skills with descriptions
- [Project Home](https://eliasoulkadi.github.io/shokunin/): Landing page with overview
- [Architecture](https://github.com/EliasOulkadi/shokunin/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): System design and component relationships
- [MCP API](https://github.com/EliasOulkadi/shokunin/blob/main/docs/MCP-API.md): Memory server API documentation
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Version history

## Skill Categories

- **Infrastructure**: docker, kubernetes, terraform, ci-cd, db-admin
- **Backend**: api-forge, auth-architect, db-sculptor, error-handler
- **Frontend**: component-forge, responsive-engine, motion-craft, landing-craft, aesthetic-web, ui-ux-pro-max
- **Mobile**: flutter, react-native
- **Quality**: test-commander, performance-profiler, code-review
- **Content**: content-marketing, translate-craft, communication, documentation
- **Productivity**: git-workflow, windows-powershell, strategy, finance
- **Documents**: kami, kagen, portfolio-auto
- **AI Agents**: agent-browser, agent-tools, skill-creator, memory, chromadb
- **System**: shokunin-update, init, find-skills, plan

## Key Documents

- [Install Guide](install.ps1): Windows PowerShell installation
- [Install Guide (Unix)](https://github.com/EliasOulkadi/shokunin/blob/main/.pack/scripts/linux/install.sh): Unix shell installation
- [Contributing](https://github.com/EliasOulkadi/shokunin/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Security](https://github.com/EliasOulkadi/shokunin/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Security policy
- [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/EliasOulkadi/shokunin/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Community standards

## GitHub

- https://github.com/eliasoulkadi/shokunin
